discussion_flags.note: MarginSense extends approximately 65.6 cm³ beyond the standard 1.5 cm uniform margin, concentrated in the superior region. The model predicts infiltration density above threshold in this zone that the fixed-margin approach does not cover. Warrants independent radiologist review before any use in planning.

The standard margin covers approximately 71.1 cm³ that MarginSense does not flag as high-density infiltration, concentrated in the anterior region. This zone may represent lower predicted infiltration risk according to the model, but clinical judgment is required.
